rationale: The cited paper is used as a key prior meta-analytic benchmark, not just a background citation. The citing study explicitly references Sethuraman et al. (2011) when positioning its contribution, adopts parts of its meta-analytic setup (including moderator handling such as recession coding), and uses it to motivate hypotheses and coding choices. It also directly compares its own elasticity estimates to the cited paper's advertising-sales elasticities when interpreting results.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the meta-analytic generalization tradition represented by Sethuraman et al. (2011) from advertising-sales response to firm-value response. It borrows benchmark conventions and moderator logic from the cited study, then broadens the scope to firm value and additional marketing constructs.
